title: Flexbox Center
description: Center an item both horizontally and vertically within a parent View using Flexbox properties.
problemStatement:
Perfect alignment! Create a `<View>` style that uses `flex: 1`, `justifyContent: 'center'`, and `alignItems: 'center'` to place a child `Text` perfectly in the middle of the screen.

**Requirement:** Apply the styles using a `StyleSheet.create` object.
hints: In Flexbox, `justifyContent` controls alignment along the primary axis (vertical by default in RN).
expectedOutput: A screen where the text is floating exactly in the center of the display
